
---
title: "Introduction to mapping and spatial analysis with R"
---
![](./img/old_map.jpg)

### This page: <https://heima.hafro.is/~julian/ftp/index.html>

### Datasets: <https://heima.hafro.is/~julian/ftp/data.zip>

## Contents

* [Introduction](intro.qmd)


## Contact info
Julian M. Burgos

MFRI - Demersal Division

Email: julian.burgos(at)hafogvatn.is
